mapper.select: SELECT milestone_id, project_id, login_id, milestone_title, milestone_describe, finish_date, milestone_status, created_at, updated_at FROM milestone ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT milestone_id, project_id, login_id, milestone_title, milestone_describe, finish_date, milestone_status, created_at, updated_at FROM milestone WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO milestone ( milestone_id, project_id, login_id, milestone_title, milestone_describe, finish_date, milestone_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{milestoneId}, #{projectId}, #{loginId}, #{milestoneTitle}, #{milestoneDescribe}, #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{milestoneStatus}, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE milestone SET milestone_title = #{milestoneTitle}, milestone_describe = #{milestoneDescribe}, finish_date = #{finishDate, jdbcType=DATE}, milestone_status = #{milestoneStatus}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE milestone_id = #{milestoneId}
